test.query: SELECT number % {cardinality} AS user, number AS ts FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY user ASC, ts DESC LIMIT 10 BY user FORMAT NULL
SELECT toStartOfHour(toDateTime(number % 86400)) AS hr, number % {cardinality} AS user, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY hr, user FORMAT NULL
SELECT if(number % 10 = 0, NULL, number % {cardinality}) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT number % 4 AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY v LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
